description: Digital Technologies capability progression map — Processes and Production Skills strand, Foundation to Y9-10. Strictly follows ACARA v9 sub-strand headings. Band-based: F, Y1-2, Y3-4, Y5-6, Y7-8, Y9-10.
subject: Digital Technologies

standards.title: Identify personal data
standards.description: Identify some data that is personal and owned by them
standards.capability_goal: Students identify some data that is personal and owned by them.

standards.title: Investigate problems for users
standards.description: Investigate simple problems for known users that can be solved with digital systems
standards.capability_goal: Students investigate simple problems for known users that can be solved with digital systems.

standards.title: Follow algorithms with branching
standards.description: Follow and describe algorithms involving a sequence of steps, branching (decisions) and iteration (repetition)
standards.capability_goal: Students follow and describe algorithms involving sequences, branching and iteration.

standards.title: Discuss existing digital systems
standards.description: Discuss how existing digital systems satisfy identified needs for known users
standards.capability_goal: Students discuss how existing digital systems satisfy identified needs for known users.

standards.title: Create and communicate content
standards.description: Use the basic features of common digital tools to create, locate and communicate content
standards.capability_goal: Students use basic features of digital tools to create, locate and communicate content.

standards.title: Share content and collaborate
standards.description: Use the basic features of common digital tools to share content and collaborate demonstrating agreed behaviours, guided by trusted adults
standards.capability_goal: Students use basic features of digital tools to share content and collaborate, demonstrating agreed behaviours guided by trusted adults.

standards.title: Access accounts with credentials
standards.description: Access their school account with a recorded username and password
standards.capability_goal: Students access their school account using a recorded username and password.

standards.title: Personal data stored online
standards.description: Discuss that some websites and apps store their personal data online
standards.capability_goal: Students discuss how websites and apps store personal data online.

standards.title: Define problems with user stories
standards.description: Define problems with given design criteria and by co-creating user stories
standards.capability_goal: Students define problems using given design criteria and co-created user stories.

standards.title: Describe algorithms with operators
standards.description: Follow and describe algorithms involving sequencing, comparison operators (branching) and iteration
standards.capability_goal: Students follow and describe algorithms involving sequencing, comparison operators and iteration.

standards.title: Generate and compare designs
standards.description: Generate, communicate and compare designs
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, communicate and compare design ideas.

standards.title: Implement visual programs
standards.description: Implement simple algorithms as visual programs involving control structures and input
standards.capability_goal: Students implement simple algorithms as visual programs involving control structures and input.

standards.title: Evaluate against design criteria
standards.description: Discuss how existing and student solutions satisfy the design criteria and user stories
standards.capability_goal: Students discuss how existing and student solutions satisfy design criteria and user stories.

standards.title: Create content with conventions
standards.description: Use the core features of common digital tools to create, locate and communicate content, following agreed conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students use core features of digital tools to create, locate and communicate content, following agreed conventions.

standards.title: Plan tasks and collaborate
standards.description: Use the core features of common digital tools to share content, plan tasks, and collaborate, following agreed behaviours, supported by trusted adults
standards.capability_goal: Students use core features of digital tools to share content, plan tasks and collaborate, following agreed behaviours.

standards.title: Memorised passwords
standards.description: Access their school account using a memorised password and explain why it should be easy to remember, but hard for others to guess
standards.capability_goal: Students access accounts using memorised passwords and explain what makes a strong password.

standards.title: Personal data risks online
standards.description: Identify what personal data is stored and shared in their online accounts and discuss any associated risks
standards.capability_goal: Students identify personal data stored in online accounts and discuss associated risks.

standards.title: Define problems with user stories
standards.description: Define problems with given or co-developed design criteria and by creating user stories
standards.capability_goal: Students define problems using given or co-developed design criteria and independently created user stories.

standards.title: Design algorithms with iteration
standards.description: Design algorithms involving multiple alternatives (branching) and iteration
standards.capability_goal: Students design algorithms involving multiple branching alternatives and iteration.

standards.title: Design a user interface
standards.description: Design a user interface for a digital system
standards.capability_goal: Students design a user interface for a digital system.

standards.title: Generate, modify and evaluate designs
standards.description: Generate, modify, communicate and evaluate designs
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, modify, communicate and evaluate design ideas.

standards.title: Implement programs with variables
standards.description: Implement algorithms as visual programs involving control structures, variables and input
standards.capability_goal: Students implement algorithms as visual programs involving control structures, variables and input.

standards.title: Evaluate against criteria and impact
standards.description: Evaluate existing and student solutions against the design criteria and user stories and their broader community impact
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate solutions against design criteria, user stories and broader community impact.

standards.title: Select tools for content creation
standards.description: Select and use appropriate digital tools effectively to create, locate and communicate content, applying common conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use appropriate digital tools to create, locate and communicate content, applying common conventions.

standards.title: Collaborate and manage projects
standards.description: Select and use appropriate digital tools effectively to share content online, plan tasks and collaborate on projects, demonstrating agreed behaviours
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use appropriate digital tools to share content, plan tasks and collaborate on projects.

standards.title: Unique passphrases and risks
standards.description: Access multiple personal accounts using unique passphrases and explain the risks of password re-use
standards.capability_goal: Students use unique passphrases across accounts and explain the risks of password re-use.

standards.title: Digital footprint and privacy
standards.description: Explain the creation and permanence of their digital footprint and consider privacy when collecting user data
standards.capability_goal: Students explain how their digital footprint is created and permanent, and consider privacy when collecting user data.

standards.title: Acquire and validate data
standards.description: Acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using software, including spreadsheets and databases
standards.capability_goal: Students acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using spreadsheets and databases.

standards.title: Analyse and visualise data
standards.description: Analyse and visualise data using a range of software, including spreadsheets and databases, to draw conclusions and make predictions by identifying trends
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse and visualise data using software to draw conclusions and make predictions by identifying trends.

standards.title: Model structured data
standards.description: Model and query the attributes of objects and events using structured data
standards.capability_goal: Students model and query the attributes of objects and events using structured data.

standards.title: Decompose real-world problems
standards.description: Define and decompose real-world problems with design criteria and by creating user stories
standards.capability_goal: Students define and decompose real-world problems using design criteria and user stories.

standards.title: Design nested algorithms
standards.description: Design algorithms involving nested control structures and represent them using flowcharts and pseudocode
standards.capability_goal: Students design algorithms with nested control structures represented in flowcharts and pseudocode.

standards.title: Trace algorithms for errors
standards.description: Trace algorithms to predict output for a given input and to identify errors
standards.capability_goal: Students trace algorithms to predict output and identify errors.

standards.title: Design user experience
standards.description: Design the user experience of a digital system
standards.capability_goal: Students design the user experience of a digital system.

standards.title: Generate and evaluate designs
standards.description: Generate, modify, communicate and evaluate alternative designs
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, modify, communicate and evaluate alternative designs.

standards.title: Implement programs with functions
standards.description: Implement, modify and debug programs involving control structures and functions in a general-purpose programming language
standards.capability_goal: Students implement, modify and debug programs using control structures and functions in a general-purpose programming language.

standards.title: Evaluate against future impact
standards.description: Evaluate existing and student solutions against the design criteria, user stories and possible future impact
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate solutions against design criteria, user stories and possible future impact.

standards.title: Use digital tools efficiently
standards.description: Select and use a range of digital tools efficiently, including unfamiliar features, to create, locate and communicate content, consistently applying common conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use digital tools efficiently including unfamiliar features, consistently applying conventions.

standards.title: Manage agile projects
standards.description: Select and use a range of digital tools efficiently and responsibly to share content online, and plan and manage individual and collaborative agile projects
standards.capability_goal: Students use digital tools responsibly to share content and plan and manage agile projects.

standards.title: Multi-factor auth and phishing
standards.description: Explain how multi-factor authentication protects an account when the password is compromised and identify phishing and other cyber security threats
standards.capability_goal: Students explain how multi-factor authentication protects accounts and identify phishing and cyber security threats.

standards.title: Manage digital footprint data
standards.description: Investigate and manage the digital footprint existing systems and student solutions collect and assess if the data is essential to their purpose
standards.capability_goal: Students investigate and manage digital footprints, assessing whether collected data is essential to purpose.

standards.title: Develop data acquisition techniques
standards.description: Develop techniques to acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using software, including spreadsheets and databases
standards.capability_goal: Students develop techniques to acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using spreadsheets and databases.

standards.title: Analyse data interactively
standards.description: Analyse and visualise data interactively using a range of software, including spreadsheets and databases, to draw conclusions and make predictions by identifying trends and outliers
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse and visualise data interactively to draw conclusions and make predictions, identifying trends and outliers.

standards.title: Model entity relationships
standards.description: Model and query entities and their relationships using structured data
standards.capability_goal: Students model and query entities and their relationships using structured data.

standards.title: Define problems via stakeholders
standards.description: Define and decompose real-world problems with design criteria and by interviewing stakeholders to create user stories
standards.capability_goal: Students define and decompose real-world problems using design criteria and stakeholder interviews to create user stories.

standards.title: Design algorithms with logic
standards.description: Design algorithms involving logical operators and represent them as flowcharts and pseudocode
standards.capability_goal: Students design algorithms involving logical operators represented as flowcharts and pseudocode.

standards.title: Validate with test cases
standards.description: Validate algorithms and programs by comparing their output against a range of test cases
standards.capability_goal: Students validate algorithms and programs by comparing output against a range of test cases.

standards.title: Design and prototype UX
standards.description: Design and prototype the user experience of a digital system
standards.capability_goal: Students design and prototype the user experience of a digital system.

standards.title: Critically evaluate designs
standards.description: Generate, modify, communicate and critically evaluate alternative designs
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, modify, communicate and critically evaluate alternative designs.

standards.title: Implement modular OOP programs
standards.description: Implement, modify and debug modular programs, applying selected algorithms and data structures, including in an object-oriented programming language
standards.capability_goal: Students implement, modify and debug modular programs applying algorithms and data structures, including in an object-oriented language.

standards.title: Evaluate for enterprise opportunities
standards.description: Evaluate existing and student solutions against the design criteria, user stories, possible future impact and opportunities for enterprise
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate solutions against design criteria, user stories, future impact and enterprise opportunities.

standards.title: Use emerging tools for audiences
standards.description: Select and use emerging digital tools and advanced features to create and communicate interactive content for a diverse audience
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use emerging digital tools and advanced features to create and communicate interactive content for diverse audiences.

standards.title: Manage projects with risk
standards.description: Use simple project management tools to plan and manage individual and collaborative agile projects, accounting for risks and responsibilities
standards.capability_goal: Students use project management tools to plan and manage agile projects, accounting for risks and responsibilities.

standards.title: Cyber security threat models
standards.description: Develop cyber security threat models, and explore a software, user or software supply chain vulnerability
standards.capability_goal: Students develop cyber security threat models and explore software, user or supply chain vulnerabilities.

standards.title: Apply Australian Privacy Principles
standards.description: Apply the Australian Privacy Principles to critique and manage the digital footprint that existing systems and student solutions collect
standards.capability_goal: Students apply the Australian Privacy Principles to critique and manage digital footprints collected by systems and solutions.

capability_threads.description: Linear capability maturation sequences per sub-strand, strictly following ACARA v9 sub-strand headings. Band-based F through Y9-10.

_notes.generating_designing_split: ACARA groups algorithm design and solution design under 'Generating and designing'. This map splits them into 'Designing algorithms' (computational/logic focus) and 'Designing solutions' (UI/UX/design ideas focus) to reflect the computational thinking vs design thinking distinction in ACARA core concepts and to keep node counts manageable per band.
_notes.acquiring_data_split: ACARA's 'Acquiring, managing and analysing data' split into 'Managing data' (acquire, store, validate, analyse, visualise — P01/P02) and 'Modelling data' (structured data, entities, relationships — P03) to keep node counts manageable and reflect the conceptual distinction.
